reason: jest boundary-mock: extended generateHandoff/summarizeDay/explainCommit tests. Per artifact: language present -> system prompt(s) contain 'Write your entire response in {language}.' (handoff BOTH phases via mockCreate + mockParse); language absent -> no directive AND a with-language run == base + exactly one line (byte-identical regression); handoff also covers whitespace-only->no directive; explainCommit covers the GitHub-fallback path. +9 tests across the three suites.

Gates: npm --prefix functions run typecheck (0), lint (0), test (37 suites / 318 tests, baseline 310, +8 net, all baseline preserved). No inline model names (MODELS.fast/reasoning), no new npm deps, no index.ts change, no deploy.

Self-review: result shapes + cache (force) semantics unchanged; language is additive/optional, validated typeof==='string' in each handler (HttpsError invalid-argument on a non-string). Absent/empty language -> byte-identical prompt -> auto trigger / scheduled report / first-tap explain unaffected (no regression).

Gates: flutter analyze 3 pre-existing issues (2 gitignored firebase_options.dart, 1 info) — no new; flutter test 91 pass +1 pre-existing fail (widget_test.dart->firebase_options.dart), baseline 85, +6, no new failures. No new pub deps. CLAUDE.md: no hardcoded colors introduced (wired existing colorScheme-based controls, light+dark compliant).

MVVM preserved: language flows View(context.l10n.backendLanguage) -> ViewModel method param -> FunctionsService. backendLanguage single source in AppLocaleX, surfaced via AppStrings (fallback-safe). FunctionsService + FakeFunctionsService + test fakes (daily_discord_tab_test, repo_list_vm_test) kept in lockstep so the contract compiles and the suite stays green.

Self-review: optional String? language with conditional-map-entry 'language': ?language (Dart shorthand already used in this file for endDate/runId). New VM tests (commits_vm_test capturing explain force+language; regenerate_locale_test mapping + summarizeDay forwarding) assert the wiring without mockito.
